rows.One-Line Project Description: A car prototype that moves based on voice commands using microcontroller and wireless communication.
rows.Problem Statement: In today’s world, controlling vehicles manually can be difficult and unsafe in certain situations such as when drivers are distracted, physically challenged, or unable to use their hands effectively. Traditional control systems require constant human effort and attention, which may lead to accidents or inefficiency. There is a need for a simple, hands-free control mechanism that improves accessibility and ease of operation without increasing cost or complexity.
rows.Your Solution: This project introduces a voice-controlled car system that allows users to control vehicle movement through spoken commands. Using a microcontroller, motor driver, and wireless communication, voice inputs are converted into control signals to move the car in different directions. The system is designed to be low-cost, easy to implement, and user-friendly, making it suitable for beginners and practical applications where hands-free control is beneficial.
rows.Key Features:
• Voice-based hands-free control
• Wireless communication (Bluetooth/Serial)
• Low-cost and simple hardware design
• Easy directional movement control (Forward, Backward, Left, Right)
• Expandable for future automation features
rows.What Makes It Unique?: Unlike typical remote-controlled cars, this project replaces manual input with natural voice commands, creating a more intuitive human-machine interaction. It combines simple hardware with real-time speech conversion to control movement without complex infrastructure. The innovation lies in delivering a low-cost, easily replicable hands-free control system that can be extended into smart mobility or assistive technology.
rows.Real-World Impact: This system can benefit physically challenged individuals by enabling easier control of devices without manual effort. It can also be applied in smart vehicles, robotics, and industrial environments where hands-free operation improves safety and efficiency. With low-cost components, it can be scaled for educational use, allowing thousands of students to learn practical automation and control systems at minimal expense.
rows.Budget Breakdown (if applicable):
• ESP32 & Motor Driver: ₹800
• Chassis & Motors: ₹1,500
• Battery & Power Supply: ₹700
• Sensors & Misc (wires, speaker): ₹1,000
rows.Infrastructure / Resources Needed: Lab / Workspace Access, Computing / Cloud Resources, Mentorship / Guidance
rows.Additional Comments (Optional): This project demonstrates a practical and low-cost approach to voice-based control systems. It has potential for further development in assistive technology and smart automation, and can be enhanced with additional features in future versions.

rows.One-Line Project Description: This used for library management based system
rows.Problem Statement: The project solves problems in manual  library systems such as time-consuming record keeping, difficult in tracking books ,and human errors . It provides a digital solution to manage books, users and transactions efficiently.It enables quick searching,easy issue and return of books ,and improves accuracy,saving time and effort for library staff.
rows.Your Solution: The project solves the problem by creating a digital Library Management system using python.It stores book details like ID, name,and quantity in an organized way. The system allows users  to easily add,view,issue,and return books. It also provides quick search and accurate record management ,making the process faster ,easier,and more efficient.
rows.Key Features:
1. Easy book management (Add, View,Update)
2. Book issue and return system 
3. Quick search of available books
4. Accurate data storage using dictionary 
5. Reduces manual work and errors
rows.What Makes It Unique?:
It's uniques are,
1. Simple and user-friendly interface 
2. Fast book search and instant results 
3. Efficient issue and return tracking 
4. Organized digital records instead of paperwork
5. Reduces errors and saves time 

My innovations are, 
1. Automation of complete library operations 
2. Quick data access using search functionality
rows.Real-World Impact:
Real world impact.
1. Saves time for librarians and users .
2. Reduces paperwork and manual errors.
3. Improves efficiency in managing library operations.

Who benefits.
1. Librarians-  save time and reduce manual work 
2. Student /users- faster book search and issue 
3. Library management - fewer errors, better tracking
4. Institutions - efficient handling of large records 

Overall, it improves speed,accuracy,and efficiency in library operations.
rows.Project Demo / Portfolio Link(if any): "My project demo shows how the Library management system works in real-time .first ,I log in to the system, then  add new books and user details . Next ,I demonstrate issuing and returning  books . Finally, I show how to search books and view records, highlighting the system's speed and accuracy ."
rows.Infrastructure / Resources Needed: Computing / Cloud Resources, Library / Research Database
rows.Additional Comments (Optional): "My project is a Library Management System developed to simplify book management and improve efficiency. l am open to suggestions and further improvements."

rows.One-Line Project Description: Detects medicine's Uses, advantages, disadvantages, side effects and amount of medicine to intake.
rows.Problem Statement: Probably, lots of people struggle while intaking medicine even the doctor mentions it and some of them are doesn't know the actual reason of the medicine prescribed by doctor. Mainly, people are tricked by some money minded doctor for not knowing the usage and side effects of the medicines
rows.Your Solution: Here is the reason for using our web application, that is : it detects the medicine's Uses, advantages, disadvantages, side effects and amount of usage precisely. So that users can easily know the actual usage and causes of the medicine without any other issue. As a result, This helps prevent misuse, reduces health risks, and ensures safer consumption, especially for patients who cannot easily verify medicines themselves.
rows.Key Features:
Reduces risk of taking wrong medicine
Detailed Medicine Information
User-Friendly Interface
Search and Manual Entry Option
rows.What Makes It Unique?: Initially, this medicine detection web application made of python, flask framework, javascript, CSS and HTML . It focuses on user safety by providing verified details such as dosage, side effects, and precautions, reducing the risk of misuse. The integration of capability allows the system to improve accuracy over time.
rows.Real-World Impact:
This project benefits general users, elderly people, patients, pharmacists, and healthcare workers by making medicine identification fast and reliable. It is especially useful for people who cannot easily read medicine labels or lack medical knowledge.
The system can identify medicines within seconds, reducing the risk of wrong consumption.
rows.Infrastructure / Resources Needed: Lab / Workspace Access, Computing / Cloud Resources, Library / Research Database, Mentorship / Guidance, Other

rows.One-Line Project Description: A Certificate Generator Management System is a software application that automates the creation, customization, and distribution of certificates efficiently
rows.Problem Statement: Manual certificate creation is time-consuming, error-prone, and inefficient, especially when handling large volumes, leading to delays, inconsistencies, and increased administrative workload
rows.Your Solution: The Certificate Generator Management System solves this problem by automating the entire certificate creation process. It allows users to input data once, select predefined templates, and instantly generate accurate, consistent certificates in bulk. The system minimizes human errors, reduces processing time, ensures uniform design, and simplifies storage and retrieval, thereby improving overall efficiency and productivity
rows.Key Features:
Automated Certificate Generation 
Bulk Processing 
Customizable Templates 
Data Management System 
Download & Sharing Options
rows.What Makes It Unique?: A smart, low-cost certificate automation system that enables instant bulk generation with dynamic personalization, real-time preview, and error-free processing—designed for fast, user-friendly use in educational institutions and organizations.
rows.Real-World Impact: Educational institutions, training centers, and organizations benefit by reducing certificate generation time by up to 90% and administrative workload by over 70%. The system can generate thousands of certificates within minutes, ensuring accuracy and consistency while significantly lowering operational costs and human errors.
rows.Tools & Software Used: Excel / Statistical Software, Programming (Python / R / Java)

rows.One-Line Project Description: A smart women safety shoe integrated with GPS and GSM technology to send emergency alerts and detect obstacles.
rows.Problem Statement: Women safety is a major concern, especially during night travel and in isolated areas. Many women face harassment and danger without immediate help. There is no quick and easy way to send location or alert others instantly. This creates fear and insecurity among women in daily life.
rows.Your Solution: This project proposes a  women safety shoe using Arduino Nano, GPS, and GSM technology. In emergency situations, the user can trigger an alert system which sends their live location to predefined contacts. The shoe also includes an ultrasonic sensor to detect obstacles and a buzzer and vibration motor to provide alerts. This system ensures safety, quick response, and confidence for women
rows.Key Features:
•Emergency alert system using GSM to send SMS instantly
•Real-time location tracking using GPS
•Obstacle detection using ultrasonic sensor
•Buzzer and vibration alert for immediate response
•Compact, wearable, and user-friendly shoe design
rows.What Makes It Unique?: This project is unique because it integrates advanced safety technology directly into a wearable shoe, making it easy and convenient to use during emergencies. Unlike traditional safety devices, it does not require carrying an extra gadget. The combination of GPS tracking, GSM alert system, and obstacle detection in a compact and user-friendly design makes it innovative and practical for everyday use.
rows.Real-World Impact: This project benefits women by providing a reliable safety solution during travel, especially at night or in isolated areas. It helps users quickly send emergency alerts with their location, ensuring faster response from family or authorities. This can improve confidence and reduce fear among women. The system is low-cost and can be widely used by students, working women, and daily commuters.
rows.Project Demo / Portfolio Link(if any): Project demo video will be provided during presentation.
rows.Additional Comments (Optional): This project aims to improve women safety by integrating smart technology into daily wear. It is cost-effective, easy to use, and has the potential for real-time implementation in society.

rows.Project Title: Secure Image Sharing Using QR code Technology
rows.One-Line Project Description: A system that securely shares images by encrypting them and embedding access data within a QR code for safe and easy retrieval.
rows.Problem Statement: In today’s digital world, sharing images through social media and messaging platforms can lead to privacy and security issues. Images can be accessed by unauthorized users, misused, or intercepted during transmission. There is no simple and secure method for users to control who can access their shared images. This creates a need for a system that ensures secure and controlled image sharing.
rows.Your Solution: Our project provides a secure image sharing system using QR code technology. The image is encrypted and stored securely, and a QR code is generated containing access information. Only authorized users who scan the QR code can decrypt and view the image. This ensures that the image is shared safely and access is restricted, preventing misuse or unauthorized viewing.
rows.Key Features:
Secure image encryption before sharing
• QR code-based access system
• Restricted access to authorized users only
• Easy and fast image retrieval
• User-friendly interface
rows.What Makes It Unique?: This project uniquely combines encryption with QR code technology to provide a simple yet secure way of sharing images. Unlike traditional methods, it ensures both data protection and controlled access in a user-friendly manner without requiring complex technical knowledge.
rows.Real-World Impact: This system benefits individuals, businesses, and organizations that need secure image sharing, such as in healthcare, education, and corporate sectors. It helps protect sensitive information, reduces the risk of data leaks, and ensures privacy. It can be widely used by thousands of users for safe digital communication.
rows.Additional Comments (Optional): This project focuses on secure and efficient image sharing using QR code technology with a user-friendly approach.

rows.One-Line Project Description: A smart attendance system that uses QR codes to mark student presence, prevent duplicates, validate entries, and generate daily Excel reports
rows.Problem Statement: Manual attendance systems are time-consuming, error-prone, and inefficient, especially in large classrooms. Teachers often spend valuable time calling out names or maintaining paper records, which can lead to mistakes, proxy attendance, and data loss. Additionally, tracking daily attendance and generating reports becomes difficult and unorganized, reducing overall productivity and accuracy.
rows.Your Solution: This project introduces a QR code-based attendance system that automates the attendance process. Each student is assigned a unique QR code, which can be scanned to mark attendance instantly. The system validates entries, prevents duplicate scans, and records timestamps automatically. It also generates daily Excel reports with present and absent students, making attendance tracking fast, accurate, and efficient.
rows.Key Features:
QR code generation for each student
Instant attendance marking using QR scanning
Duplicate entry prevention and validation
Automatic timestamp recording
Daily Excel report generation (present & absent list)
rows.What Makes It Unique?: Unlike traditional attendance systems, this project ensures accuracy by preventing duplicate and invalid entries in real time. It combines QR technology with automatic report generation, reducing manual effort completely. The system is simple, low-cost, and does not require complex hardware, making it easy to implement in schools and colleges.
rows.Real-World Impact: This system can be used in schools, colleges, and organizations to save time and improve attendance accuracy. It reduces manual workload for teachers and minimizes errors. With automated reports and digital records, institutions can manage attendance efficiently. It is especially useful for large classrooms, where manual tracking is difficult and time-consuming.
rows.Tools & Software Used: Excel / Statistical Software, Programming (Python / R / Java)

rows.Project Title: "CAMPUS BUDDY" - Web based Chatbot for College Information.
rows.One-Line Project Description: “Campus Buddy” is a web-based chatbot that provides instant and accurate college-related information to students and parents, improving communication and accessibility. Also, used to reduce workload for our college management.
rows.Problem Statement: In many colleges, students face difficulty in accessing accurate and timely information about academic schedules, courses, events, and administrative processes. Most information is scattered across websites, notice boards, or requires direct interaction with staff, which can be time-consuming and inconvenient. This often leads to confusion, delays, and miscommunication. The problem is the lack of a centralized, user-friendly system that can provide instant and reliable college-related information anytime, reducing dependency on manual support.
rows.Your Solution: The “Campus Buddy” chatbot provides a centralized and user-friendly platform where students can instantly access all college-related information through a web interface. It uses Python-based responses to answer queries about courses, timetables, events, and notices in real-time. This reduces the need for manual communication with staff and minimizes delays. It ensures students get accurate information quickly, improving efficiency and overall communication within the college.
rows.Key Features:
• Instant response system
• Centralized college information access
• User-friendly web interface
• Automated query handling using chatbot
• Quick updates on events and announcements
rows.What Makes It Unique?: This project stands out by combining a simple web-based interface with intelligent chatbot functionality tailored specifically for college environments. Unlike traditional static websites, it provides real-time, interactive responses to student queries. It reduces dependency on staff and notice boards, making information access faster, smarter, and more efficient.
rows.Real-World Impact: The Campus Buddy chatbot benefits students, faculty, and administrative staff by simplifying communication and saving time. It can assist hundreds of students simultaneously, reducing workload on college offices. By providing instant and accurate information, it improves student experience, minimizes confusion, and ensures better engagement within the institution.

rows.Project Title: IoT Health Monitoring ( Heart Rate , Tempurature, Oxygen )
rows.One-Line Project Description: Smart IoT Health Monitoring System – Heart rate, temperature, oxygen level measure pannitu ESP32 moolama online-la monitor panna system.
rows.Problem Statement: Many people do not regularly monitor their health parameters like heart rate, body temperature, and oxygen level. Frequent hospital visits are costly and time-consuming. In emergency situations, lack of continuous monitoring can lead to serious health risks. Especially for elderly people and patients, there is a need for an affordable and easy way to track health in real time.
rows.Your Solution: Our project uses an ESP32-based IoT system to continuously monitor heart rate, temperature, and oxygen level. The data is collected using sensors and displayed in real-time. It can also be sent online using WiFi, allowing users or doctors to monitor health remotely. This system is low-cost, portable, and easy to use at home.
rows.Key Features:
• Real-time health monitoring
• Low-cost and portable device
• WiFi-based remote monitoring
• Displays heart rate, temperature, and SpO2
• Easy to use and setup
rows.What Makes It Unique?: This project combines multiple health parameters into one compact IoT system using ESP32. It is designed to be affordable and simple for everyday use. Unlike expensive medical devices, this system provides basic health monitoring at a very low cost, making it suitable for students and common people.
rows.Real-World Impact: This system can help elderly people, patients, and rural communities monitor their health easily. It reduces the need for frequent hospital visits and enables early detection of health issues. It can be used in homes, clinics, and small healthcare setups, benefiting many people at a low cost.
rows.Tools & Software Used: Programming (Python / R / Java), Arduino / Raspberry Pi / Hardware, Other
rows.Estimated Budget Required (if applicable: We are very low family backgroud so if yoy give any type of amount or job that will be the best for our life
rows.Infrastructure / Resources Needed: Lab / Workspace Access, Computing / Cloud Resources, Library / Research Database, Mentorship / Guidance, Other
